productDisplayName: Levis Kids Boy's Dawson Red Teens Kidswear
description: Composition Red round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with print and branding embroidery across the chest and red soft padding on the inside collar to soak sweat Fitting Regular 46 cm Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water, colour likely to bleed Use mild detergent Can dry clean Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Dry flat inside out in shade Iron at medium setting only Iron on reverse Wash before wearing Get ready to take your little boy on the style trip of his life with this white and red tee from Levi's. The simple print across the chest with the brand embroidery gels perfectly with his little boy charm. Team this with denim shorts and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with his small buddies, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
